title: Unable to input into "Connect:" field for PuTTY
author: JimmyTheRustler8
body_snippet:
When I open more than one tab I cannot click into the "Connect:" field to input another server for a new tab. It appears to be highlighting the text but when I type the output is displayed in my current active session, rather than the input field of the text box.

Has/is anyone else having this issue?

Thanks
J 

<!--
Only file GitHub issues for bugs and feature requests.  All other topics will be closed.

Before opening an issue, please search for a duplicate or closed issue.
Please ...

iterations.description: Issue is from 2018 with no recent confirmation on current builds; the triage comment already requested retest and reproducible steps but no response was provided.

comments.author: absmith82
comments.snippet:
I have been having this issue since version 1.74  a work around is to click the title bar a few times till it is highlighted then you can click/type into the connection box again.

This should be marked as a bug if it isn't already.

comments.author: KeiroD
simon1tan
comments.snippet:
I've had the same problem. Try to copy paste into this field and nothing. Can't even type into the field. This also happens with the MultiSSH field.
Win 10 Pro x64 mRemoteNG v1.76.20.24669

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.
